title: Wasp Removal in Longwood, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in Longwood, Bronx. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Facing a wasp problem in Longwood? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe wasp removal services throughout this vibrant Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians specialize in eliminating wasp nests from homes, apartment buildings, and businesses across Longwood, ensuring your property is protected from stinging insects.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Longwood residents, we understand the unique pest challenges of this densely populated Bronx community. Our team responds quickly, uses eco-friendly treatments safe for families and pets, and offers transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Longwood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, row houses near Kelly Street, and properties around Longwood Avenue create numerous opportunities for wasps to build nests in eaves, fire escapes, and ventilation systems. The area's proximity to St. Mary's Park and tree-lined residential blocks means increased wasp activity during warmer months, making professional removal essential for resident safety.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Longwood range from $350 to $550, depending on the nest size, location accessibility, and number of nests. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins, with no hidden charges.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Longwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Longwood and the Bronx. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. Emergency services are available for aggressive wasp situations.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved treatments that are highly effective against wasps while being safe for children and pets. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will advise you on any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Longwood residents most frequently encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species often nest in building overhangs, trees, and wall voids. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all wasp species common to the Bronx area.
